name: ai-review-plugins
description: AI-powered code review plugins for Claude Code. Currently ships the security-review plugin (OWASP Top 10:2025 audit with 10 parallel sub-agents and four-axis priority ranking).

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: OWASP Top 10:2025 security review. Dispatches 10 parallel sub-agents to audit a PR or codebase with four-axis priority ranking (Severity x Exploitability x Exposure x Confidence -> Priority P0-P4).
